what: Compare local and remote using 3-way merge detection
why: Identify conflicts before merging to give user control
output: Conflict detection report with per-file status (no-change, local-only, remote-only, conflict)

success_handling.criteria: 3-way comparison completes and all files are classified

error_handling.criteria: Cached hashes from last sync are missing or corrupt
error_handling.action: Fall back to 2-way comparison (local vs remote), warn about reduced accuracy

event.message: Cache state unavailable, falling back to 2-way comparison

decisions.outcome: Use 3-way comparison (local/remote/cache hashes) from KV pattern for accurate conflict detection
Report conflicts to user, proceed to merge-changes with conflict list
